You are a Story Director for viral short-form pixel-art animated videos.

Your job: take a story prompt and output a structured JSON scene manifest.

## Story Framework

Every story follows this beat structure:
1. hook — grabs attention in 1.5–3 seconds, promises something is coming
2. foreshadow — 2 lines, under 3 seconds, plants the setup
3. obstacle — the problem or conflict hits
4. amplifier — tension escalates, stakes increase
5. twist — unexpected reversal or reveal
6. payoff — instant resolution, end immediately

## Hard Rules

- Hook must be the first scene, under 4 seconds
- Payoff must be the last scene
- Total runtime: 28–34 seconds (target_duration_sec should be 30)
- 5th-grade reading level — short, punchy narration
- But/therefore storytelling — never "and then"
- End IMMEDIATELY after payoff, no cool-down
- emotion_intensity should escalate: hook ~0.6, payoff ~1.0

## Output Format

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching this schema exactly. No markdown, no explanation.

{
  "title": "string",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "suspense|comedy|horror|heartwarming|action|mystery|triumph|tragedy|shock|curiosity",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook|foreshadow|obstacle|amplifier|twist|payoff",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "string",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": ["character_name"],
      "camera": "wide|medium|close|extreme_close|overhead|low_angle",
      "visual_description": "string",
      "action": "string",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
A man's autocorrect starts a chain reaction he can't stop

{
  "title": "One Typo Away",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "One text message. That's all it took to ruin everything.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Man sitting on couch, phone in hand, big smile",
      "action": "Man types quickly, hits send with confidence",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He meant to text his boss he'd be late to work.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen shows: 'I'll be late, stuck in traffic'",
      "action": "Man's finger hovers over send button",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.5
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "But autocorrect had other ideas. 'Late' became 'Lactose.'",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen glitches, text changes to: 'I'll be LACTOSE, stuck in traffic'",
      "action": "Man's eyes go wide, message already sent",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "His boss replied instantly: 'What do you mean lactose? Are you okay?' So he tried to fix it. But 'fix' became 'fix my cow.'",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Phone buzzing with notifications, man frantically typing",
      "action": "Man's face gets redder with each typo correction",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.85
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 8,
      "narration": "Now the boss thinks he owns livestock. His coworkers are texting him asking if he's started a farm. His HR lady just sent a wellness check form.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen flooded with confused texts from multiple people",
      "action": "Man frantically deleting, typing, autocorrect changing everything",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "He just got an email. The company is setting up a farm benefits package. He quit.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man staring at laptop screen in shock, phone on floor",
      "action": "Man closes laptop, phone still buzzing in background",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A man tries to pretend he knows how to cook at a first date dinner

{
  "title": "Chef for One Night",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He told her he was an amazing cook. He was not.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Man in apron at kitchen stove, confident smile, woman sitting at table",
      "action": "Man gestures grandly at kitchen setup",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He pulled out his phone and opened YouTube.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Man's hand holding phone, YouTube recipe video playing",
      "action": "Man watches video intently, nodding",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "But the pan was too hot, so the oil started smoking.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Smoke billowing from frying pan, man waving hand",
      "action": "Smoke alarm beeping, man panicking",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.75
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "Therefore, he threw water on it. Which made it worse. Way worse.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Flames shooting up from pan, woman covering face",
      "action": "Fire extinguisher appears in frame",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "But then she grabbed the fire extinguisher and saved dinner.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Woman spraying foam, man stepping back, pan now covered",
      "action": "Woman hands extinguisher to man, walks to door",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "Turns out she was a firefighter. Best first date ever.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Woman in firefighter uniform back at door, man grinning sheepishly",
      "action": "Woman winks, door closes",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A thief returns stolen goods after realizing who they stole from

{
  "title": "Wrong House",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "shock",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "This thief just broke into a house and grabbed everything valuable.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Dark bedroom, thief stuffing jewelry and cash into backpack",
      "action": "Thief moves quickly, grabbing items from nightstand",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He was out the door in seconds, feeling like a pro.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Thief climbing out window, backpack heavy on shoulders",
      "action": "Thief drops to ground, runs toward street",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "But back at his apartment, when he emptied the bag, he found a photo.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Thief dumping contents on bed, picking up framed photograph",
      "action": "Thief's face goes pale as he looks at the photo",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.75
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "It was a photo of him, his mom, and his grandmother. At his grandmother's house.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Close-up of photo showing young thief smiling with elderly grandmother",
      "action": "Thief's hands shake, photo trembles",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "He'd robbed his own grandmother. The woman who raised him. The woman he loved.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Thief sitting on bed, head in hands, stolen jewelry scattered around",
      "action": "Thief looks up, realization hits hard",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 9,
      "narration": "Twenty minutes later, he was at her door with everything back.",
      "dialogue": "Grandma, I'm sorry. I messed up.",
      "characters_visible": [
        "thief",
        "grandmother"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Thief standing at grandmother's doorstep holding backpack, she opens door in confusion then recognition",
      "action": "Grandmother's face shifts from shock to understanding, she pulls him into a hug",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A shoplifter gets caught by their own selfie

{
  "title": "Shoplifter Gets Caught By Their Own Selfie",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "heartwarming",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 2.7,
      "narration": "Nobody expected what was about to happen.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "character"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Wide establishing shot of the setting with main character visible",
      "action": "Scene opens with the main character in an ordinary situation",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.61
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3.4,
      "narration": "But something felt off.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "character"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Camera lingers on an object or person in the background",
      "action": "Character notices a detail that will matter later",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.57
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 5.1,
      "narration": "Then everything changed.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "character"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Close shot of character's reaction to the obstacle",
      "action": "The central conflict or problem hits the character directly",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.71
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6.2,
      "narration": "But nobody saw this coming.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "character"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Reveal shot \u2014 the hidden truth becomes visible",
      "action": "The unexpected reversal \u2014 the thing the viewer was not expecting",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.92
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 12.6,
      "narration": "Turns out, they'd planned this all along.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "character"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Final image \u2014 character in control, situation resolved",
      "action": "Resolution snaps into place \u2014 cut immediately after",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A man finds his own obituary in a newspaper from last week

{
  "title": "Dead Man Reading",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "mystery",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "A man opened his newspaper and saw something that made his blood run cold.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Man's face in morning light, holding newspaper",
      "action": "Man's expression shifts from calm to shocked",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "It was dated seven days ago. The headline read: Local Man Dies in Car Accident.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Newspaper page showing obituary with man's photo",
      "action": "Man's finger traces the date on the paper",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "His name was there. His age was there. His photo was there.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man reading details, hand trembling",
      "action": "Man stands up, looking at his own hands in disbelief",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.8
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "But he was standing right there, reading it. Alive. Real. His heart was beating.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "low_angle",
      "visual_description": "Man staring at his hands, then at his reflection in window",
      "action": "Man touches his own face, checks his pulse",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "Then he flipped back through the newspaper. And found seven more obituaries. All with his name. All from different weeks.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Man surrounded by scattered newspaper pages, multiple identical obituaries visible",
      "action": "Man's face goes pale as he realizes the pattern",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "He looked toward the window. There was no reflection.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Man's face at window, glass shows empty space behind him",
      "action": "Man's eyes widen in horror as realization hits",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

You are a Story Director for viral short-form pixel-art animated videos.

Your job: take a story prompt and output a structured JSON scene manifest.

## Story Framework

Every story follows this beat structure:
1. hook — grabs attention in 1.5–3 seconds, promises something is coming
2. foreshadow — 2 lines, under 3 seconds, plants the setup
3. obstacle — the problem or conflict hits
4. amplifier — tension escalates, stakes increase
5. twist — unexpected reversal or reveal
6. payoff — instant resolution, end immediately

## Hard Rules

- Hook must be the first scene, under 4 seconds
- Payoff must be the last scene
- Total runtime: 28–34 seconds (target_duration_sec should be 30)
- 5th-grade reading level — short, punchy narration
- But/therefore storytelling — never "and then"
- End IMMEDIATELY after payoff, no cool-down
- emotion_intensity should escalate: hook ~0.6, payoff ~1.0

## Output Format

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching this schema exactly. No markdown, no explanation.

  "title": "string",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "suspense|comedy|horror|heartwarming|action|mystery|triumph|tragedy|shock|curiosity",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook|foreshadow|obstacle|amplifier|twist|payoff",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "string",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": ["character_name"],
      "camera": "wide|medium|close|extreme_close|overhead|low_angle",
      "visual_description": "string",
      "action": "string",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
